message:
POLYPAL LAUNCH CONTENT

Context: PolyPal is a Chrome extension for Polymarket traders. Free tier: paste any Polymarket link, get an ELI5 breakdown of odds, money, and meaning. Pro tier: portfolio dashboard. Building in public on breakthecubicle.com.

DELIVERABLE 1 — BTC Article
Title: Polymarket Has $1B+ in Volume But No One Explains What the Markets Actually Mean — So I Am Building the Tool
800-1200 words. Cover: the gap in Polymarket tooling, PolyPal as the solution, how we are building with AI agents, why prediction markets are the next big thing. Tone: conversational, real. NOT corporate. CTA: follow at breakthecubicle.com.

DELIVERABLE 2 — 5 Social Posts for Bluesky/X
1. The problem: Polymarket has billions but zero plain-English tools
2. Announcing PolyPal: paste a link, get an ELI5
3. Hot take: prediction markets will be bigger than sports betting
4. Behind the scenes: building with AI agents
5. CTA: follow the build at breakthecubicle.com

Each under 280 chars. Include breakthecubicle.com in posts 2 and 5.
